ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the week the game is scheduled in */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Home team score */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Away team score */,
  "neutral_site" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game is played at a neutral site */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Name or address of the venue */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Type of sport */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the team belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach for the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Type of sport for the division */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Name of the conference the division belongs to */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weeks" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each week */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Number of the week */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the week */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the week */,
  "season" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, administrator, fan) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., yards gained, points scored) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the game when the statistic was recorded */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time in the game when the statistic was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., passing_yards, rushing_yards) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the game when the statistic was recorded */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time in the game when the statistic was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., quarterback, wide receiver) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player (in inches) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player (in pounds) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "year_in_college" TEXT /* Year of the player in college (e.g., freshman, sophomore) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
